message:
feat: implement feature-contributed mounts

Add support for features to contribute mounts via metadata.Mounts.
Features can now specify bind mounts, volumes, etc. that will be
applied to the container at runtime using Docker's --mount syntax.

Test Coverage:
- TestApplyFeatureMounts verifies mount flags are added correctly
- Tests both bind and volume mount types
- Validates proper Docker mount syntax generation

Implementation:
- Loop through metadata.Mounts in ApplyFeatureProperties
- Generate --mount flags with type, source, and target
- Append to docker args for runtime application

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
